homepage.platesBilingualBody: List in 10 minutes from any device. Native support for Mandarin, Korean, and Vietnamese. Invisible to English-only competitors.

homepage.platesDemandBody: Buyers must show proof of funds or SBA pre-qualification before seller contacts are released. Vetted by our advisors. Zero spam.

membership.metaTitle: Become A Member — Pass The Plate
membership.metaDescription: Pick the plan that matches your appetite. From $0 First Bite to The Full Menu at $249/month.
membership.heroBody: Three ways to get serious about your next deal. Cancel anytime.

tiers.freeBody: Browse the marketplace and explore market data on us. Perfect for tire-kicking.
tiers.midBody: For active buyers and sellers ready to engage. Direct seller intros and an advisor on call.
tiers.midBullet4: Up to 60 minutes with an advisor
tiers.topBody: White-glove access for serious operators. Dedicated advisor and unlimited support.

faqs.q: What's included in my Pass The Plate plan?
faqs.a: Each plan unlocks a different level of marketplace access — from preview-only on First Bite, to unlimited listings and a dedicated advisor on The Full Menu. See the bullets on each tier above for the specifics.

faqs.q: How can I upgrade, downgrade, or cancel my subscription?
faqs.a: Anytime from your account settings. Upgrades take effect immediately; downgrades and cancellations apply at the end of your current billing cycle.

faqs.q: How can I get in touch with a sales support team?
faqs.a: Email hello@passtheplate.store or use the contact form in your account dashboard. We typically respond within one business day.

faqs.q: Where can I find live tutorials and documentation?
faqs.a: All members get access to The Playbook with step-by-step guides. Live walkthroughs are scheduled monthly — check your inbox for invites.

faqs.q: How do I troubleshoot my account if I'm having issues logging in?
faqs.a: Try requesting a new magic link from /signin. If that doesn't work, email support@passtheplate.store with the email you registered with.

faqs.q: How do I optimize my account so I get access to the right resources?
faqs.a: Fill out your profile completely (interests, deal size, location). Our system surfaces relevant listings and partner intros based on what you tell us.

faqs.q: Where will my information be used?
faqs.a: Only to match you with relevant deals and partners. We don't sell data and we anonymize buyer identities until a seller approves the intro.

faqs.q: Who can benefit from a Pass The Plate plan?
faqs.a: Buyers, sellers, advisors, attorneys, and lenders working in the Asian F&B space. If you're transacting in this market, there's a plan for you.
Yes — toggle off auto-renewal in account settings. You'll keep access until the end of the current billing cycle.

faqs.q: I'd like a personal broker — how can I find one that fits my needs?
faqs.a: Chef's Table and Full Menu members get matched to a vetted broker based on cuisine, market, and deal size. We'll introduce within 48 hours.

faqs.q: What is the listing process like? How much will I need to pay?
faqs.a: Listing is free — there's no upfront cost. We charge a 3–5% success fee only when your business sells.

faqs.q: What is the buying process like? Are there any additional fees?
faqs.a: Free to browse and inquire. If we facilitate the deal end-to-end, we charge a buy-side fee on closing — disclosed before any commitment.

partner.metaTitle: Become A Partner — Pass The Plate
partner.metaDescription: Join the Pass The Plate partner network — brokers, attorneys, lenders, and advisors serving Asian F&B operators.
partner.intro: If you serve Asian F&B operators — bilingual brokers, immigration attorneys, SBA lenders, restaurant designers — we want to hear from you.

fields.specialtyPlaceholder: e.g. SBA lending, immigration law, restaurant design
fields.bioPlaceholder: Tell us about your practice and the operators you've helped.

partner.success: Application received — we'll be in touch within a week.
partner.lookingForBody: Bilingual specialists who have closed real deals in the Asian F&B space and treat operators like family — not transactions.
partner.spec1Body: Cuisine-specific dealmakers who can read both sides of the table.
partner.spec2Body: Immigration, lease, and M&A counsel licensed in operator hubs.
partner.spec3Body: SBA 7(a), commercial mortgage, and bridge financing experts.
